holdings.infoBox: SPCH is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long SPCX Daily ETF (SPCH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Space Exploration Technologies Corp (NASDAQ: SPCX) or SpaceX stock, less fees and expenses. SPCH was launched on Jun 15, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
